visuals.title: Relational Model
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Relational Model Concepts</text>
  
  <!-- Relations -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Relations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Attributes -->
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Attributes
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Tuples -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tuples
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Keys -->
  <rect x="50" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Keys
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows connecting concepts -->
  <line x1="110" y1="100" x2="110" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="110" y1="160" x2="110" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="110" y1="220" x2="110" y2="240" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Right side examples -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="140" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Example Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Table headers -->
  <text x="270" y="100" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    ID
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="320" y="100" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Name
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="340" y="120" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    101
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="340" y="140" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    102
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="320" y="120" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    John
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="320" y="140" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#333" opacity="0">
    Jane
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connecting arrows from concepts to example -->
  <line x1="170" y1="80" x2="250" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="140" x2="250" y2="100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="200" x2="250" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="260" x2="250" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
